userStories.label: As a _ I want so I can _
As a _ ,I waant to
As a __, I want to __
As a user, I want to see important navigation links in the footer, so that I can easily access key pages.
As a user, I want the footer to be clearly structured so that I can easily find the information I need.
As a user with accessibility needs, I want to navigate the footer using assistive technologies so that I can access all links without barriers.
As a user, I want to see a list of relevant jobs after performing a search, so that I can quickly identify suitable opportunities.
As a user, I want to be able to filter listings by city, so that I can see only the jobs available in the location that interests me.
As a user, I want to be able to filter listings by company, so that I can see only the jobs posted by a specific employer.
As a user, I want to be able to filter listings by work mode (e.g. Fizic, Hybrid, La distanta), so that I can see only the jobs that match my work preferences.
As a user, I want the footer to be consistent across all pages, so that I have a uniform experience.
As a user, I want the footer to always be visible at the bottom of the page, so that I can access it easily.
As a user, I want a quick way to go back to the top of the page from the footer, so that I save time.
As a user, I want to search for jobs using different criteria so that I can see job listings matching my criteria.
As a user, I want to access Politica de confidentialitate and Conditii de utilizare from the footer, so that I understand how my data is used.
As a user, I want to see copyright information in the footer, so that I know who owns the platform.
As a user, I want to see information about the organization behind the platform, so that I can trust the service.
As a website user, I want to see social media icons in the footer so that I can easily find the company's social profiles.
As a website user, I want to click on social media icons so that I can access the company's social media pages.
As a website user, I want to see tooltips on social media icons so that I understand where each link leads.
As a user, I want the footer to render correctly in all supported browsers so that I have a consistent visual experience.
As a user, I want all footer links to function correctly across different browsers so that I can navigate without issues.
As a user, I want the footer to behave consistently across browsers so that interactions feel the same everywhere.
As a user, I want the footer to display correctly on different devices so that I can have a consistent experience regardless of screen size.
As a user, I want the website footer to function correctly across different operating systems so that I can have a consistent experience regardless of the platform I use.
As a user, I want the footer to follow the same visual style as the rest of the website so that the interface feels consistent.
As a user, I want the footer content to have a clear visual hierarchy so that I can quickly understand the most important information.
As a user, I want all footer icons and links to have consistent styling so that the interface looks clean and professional.
